articles.title: BlackRock CEO Calls Crypto Rally ‘Flight to Quality’, Not Rumors
articles.description: Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, said in an interview that the crypto rally represents a "flight to quality" driven by real economic factors, not false speculation.This rally is way beyond rumor. The rally today is about a flight to quality with all these issues around the Israeli war, Fink said. More people are running to flight to quality whether that's on...
